content: I ricercatori alla Gorilla Foundation devono sillabare parole come 'c-a-n-d-y' e 'g-u-m' quando Koko è nelle vicinanze.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Researchers at the Gorilla Foundation have to spell out words like c-a-n-d-y and g-u-m when Koko is nearby
